nav.cartError: Unable to load your cart right now.
nav.cartEmptyDescription: Browse the catalog and add items to your cart.

catalog.title: Products
catalog.promoDescription: Offers and featured products will show up here soon.
catalog.origineFilterHint: Show products matching any selected origin.
catalog.origineFilterEmpty: No origin options found. Check `pa_origine` in WooCommerce and `src/lib/woo-origine-regime.ts`.
catalog.regimeFilterHint: Show products matching any selected régime.
catalog.regimeFilterEmpty: No régime options found. Check `pa_regime` in WooCommerce and `src/lib/woo-origine-regime.ts`.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.thankYouWooLink: View order details on g-food.ch (opens in a new tab)
checkout.viewOrderInShop: View your order in the shop
checkout.noPaymentMethods: No payment methods are available for this cart. Enable gateways in WooCommerce.
checkout.signInForCheckout: Sign in to use your saved details and link this order to your account.
checkout.selectPayment: Select a payment method to continue.
checkout.selectShipping: Select a shipping option for each shipment.
checkout.orderIncomplete: We could not confirm your order reference. If you were charged, contact us with your details. You can refresh the page or return to your cart.

orders.metaDescription: View your past orders placed on G-Food.
orders.title: Order history
orders.intro: Orders for your WooCommerce customer, plus guest orders placed with the same e-mail as your profile. After checkout while signed in, we attach that order to your account when possible.
orders.noCustomer: We could not match your account to a customer record. If you just registered, try again after your first order, or contact us.
orders.unavailableCredentials: Order history is not available right now (shop configuration).
orders.loadError: We could not load your orders. Please try again later.
orders.emptyHint: When you place an order while signed in, it will appear here. Guest checkouts are not listed.
orders.detailThankYouSub: We have received your order and will process it shortly.
orders.detailForbidden: You do not have access to this order.
orders.detailError: We could not load this order. Please try again later.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.intro: We deliver within Switzerland. Timeframes and service areas may vary; we will confirm details when you place your order.
delivery.freeFrom: Delivery is free on orders of CHF {amount} or more (incl. VAT).
delivery.note: Summary information only — final terms are confirmed at checkout.

auth.metaDescription: Sign in with your G-Food account to shop online.
auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Use your account to continue shopping.
auth.wpHelp: You sign in with the same WordPress account as on our main website (e-mail or username and password, or a WordPress application password).
auth.registerMetaDescription: Create your G-Food account to sign in faster at checkout.
auth.registerSubtitle: Use your e-mail and a password. You can sign in on this shop right away.
auth.registerErrorEmailExists: An account with this e-mail already exists. Sign in instead.
auth.registerErrorValidation: Check your e-mail and password and try again.
auth.registerErrorSignInAfter: Account created, but sign-in failed. Try signing in manually.
auth.registerErrorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
auth.securityOriginRejected: We could not verify this request came from our shop. Use the same address you see in the browser bar, or refresh the page and try again.
auth.registerErrorWpSync: We could not create your account right now because the shop cannot talk to the site backend. Please try again later or contact us.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies and similar technologies
cookieConsent.intro: We use cookies and local storage to run the shop, keep your cart, and—only if you agree—to measure use and show relevant offers.
cookieConsent.categoryNecessaryBody: Required for basic shop functions (cart session, security tokens, sign-in when you choose it). These are set without optional marketing or analytics consent.
cookieConsent.categoryAnalyticsBody: Helps us understand how the site is used (e.g. page views). Not loaded until you opt in.
cookieConsent.categoryMarketingBody: Personalised offers or remarketing tags from partners. Not loaded until you opt in.

impressum.metaDescription: Legal notice and contact details for CoFood Sàrl, G-Food.
impressum.title: Legal notice

privacy.metaDescription: Information on how CoFood Sàrl processes personal data and cookies on this shop.
privacy.title: Privacy and data protection
privacy.notLegalAdvice: This notice is provided for transparency. It does not replace legal advice; please align it with your actual processing and Swiss law.
privacy.intro: CoFood Sàrl (“we”) operates this online shop. We process personal data in line with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP) and, where cookies or similar technologies are not strictly necessary, the Telecommunications Act (TCA). The Swiss Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC) publishes guidance on cookies and tracking.
privacy.controllerBody: CoFood Sàrl, Route de Vevey 130, CH-1630 Bulle. Contact: see our legal notice.
privacy.purposesBody: We process data to present products, manage your cart and orders, handle payments via our WooCommerce backend, provide customer accounts, improve our service, and—only with your consent where required—for analytics or marketing.
privacy.cookiesIntro: The table below lists typical technologies we use. Session cookies needed for the shop are generally considered technically necessary; optional analytics or marketing scripts are only activated after you opt in in the cookie dialog.

cartToken.name: woo_cart_token
cartToken.purpose: Keeps your WooCommerce Store API cart session.

storeNonce.name: woo_store_nonce
storeNonce.purpose: Security token for Store API requests.

sessionToken.name: storefront.session-token
sessionToken.purpose: Keeps you signed in when you use an account.

taxonomyPreview.name: woo_taxonomy_preview
taxonomyPreview.purpose: Optional internal preview of category navigation (staff tools).

consentPrefs.name: g-food-cookie-consent (localStorage)
consentPrefs.purpose: Stores your cookie choices and version so we do not ask unnecessarily.

privacy.checkoutBody: Completing payment may redirect you to our WordPress / WooCommerce site or a payment provider. That site or provider may set its own cookies or process data under its privacy policy. We only use payment data to fulfil your order.
privacy.googleBody: If you use Google sign-in, Google processes data according to Google’s policies. We receive basic profile details needed to create or match your shop account.
privacy.rightsBody: Depending on the situation, you may have rights under the FADP including information, correction, deletion, objection, and data portability in certain cases. You may lodge a complaint with the FDPIC.
privacy.withdrawBody: You can reopen “Cookie settings” in the footer at any time to turn optional categories off. Necessary cookies remain for basic shop operation.
privacy.updatesBody: We may update this notice when our processing or the law changes. Material changes should be reflected here and, where needed, in the cookie banner version.
